name: Impetus Turn (Open)
preceding_figure_names: Curved Feather to Back Feather, Natural Turn, Natural Twist Turn, Reverse Wave
following_figure_names: Feather Step, Weave from PP, Natural Weave (Natural Weave from PP), Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Curved Feather to Back Feather (starting in PP)
notes: Maintain sway and diagonal stretch; do not lift the toe off the floor; ball of foot skims the floor; change sway to PP and pull across thighs, hips, rib cage; finish with body slightly ahead of Lady; stay behind Man; head turn slowly.

comments: Maintain the sway from previous figure as you lower through CBM, keep the diagonal stretch.
Do not lift the toe off the floor. The ball of the foot needs to stay skimming the floor.

steps.action: LF diag. fwd in PP, L side leading
comments: Change sway to PP, pull across thighs, hips, rib cage, sending head forward, rotate to right to send lady to PP.
Finish with body slightly ahead of Lady.

steps.action: RF fwd in PP and CBMP

comments: Do not turn too early, swing left side up (do not drop left shoulder, to be light on Man), stay behind Man.

steps.action: RF to side in PP having brushed to LF
comments: Allow feet to turn. Pull center back.

steps.action: LF fwd and across in PP and CBMP
comments: Let head finish the action at the very last. Head turn slowly.
